ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-31-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST GEORGE L. COHN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-10-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LINDA FORSTER, CSR# 13286 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
